# CWE-565: privileged delete trusts unverified role cookie value.
lang: go
file: CWE-565-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func DeleteTenant(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	role, _ := c.Cookie("role")
	if role != "admin" {
		c.String(http.StatusForbidden, "forbidden")
		return
	}
	db.Exec("DELETE FROM tenants WHERE id = ?", c.Param("id"))
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
